member.name: M:GTA.Entity.IsInAngledArea(GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.summary:
Determines whether this
is in a specified angled area. An angled area is an X-Z oriented rectangle with three parameters: origin, extent, and width.
member.param: The mid-point along a base edge of the rectangle.
The mid-point of opposite base edge on the other Z.
The length of the base edge.

If set to
, the method will also check if the point is in area in Z axis as well as X and Y axes. If set to
, the method will only check if the point is in area in X and Y axes.
member.returns:
if this
is in the specified angled area; otherwise,
.
